reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para hacer un alto en el camino, hacia buenos aires, buena arboleda, y la carpa situada atras con una parrilla restaurante de primera calidad, ojala estuviéramos mas cerca.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place to stop along the way to Buenos Aires, with a good grove of trees, and the tent located behind it with a top-quality grill restaurant. I wish we were closer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBeWRHQkhREAE

reviews.comment:
Buen parador en la ruta 2 con confortables áreas arboladas, parrilla, juegos para niños y estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
A good rest stop on Route 2 with comfortable wooded areas, a grill, a children's playground, and a gas station.

reviews.comment:
La parrilla del lugar es pésima, cada vez peor, juramos que no volvemos más, siempre le dimos otra oportunidad, pero cada vez está peor

(Translated by Google)
The grill at this place is terrible, getting worse all the time. We swear we're never going back. We always gave it another chance, but it just keeps getting worse.
